modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty accessing my.usd.edu and PAMS websites.

full_description_text: I'm having a tough time accessing the my.usd.edu website; it keeps timing out. Also, when I try to get into PAMS, which is essential for my grant from the Department of Energy, it redirects me to Science Direct. However, I can't open the journal's PDF from there, which is really frustrating.
short_description: Difficulty accessing my.usd.edu and PAMS websites.
description: I'm having a tough time accessing the my.usd.edu website; it keeps timing out. Also, when I try to get into PAMS, which is essential for my grant from the Department of Energy, it redirects me to Science Direct. However, I can't open the journal's PDF from there, which is really frustrating.
